title: Xtra Pungent Malaysian Cheese Noodles
description: A pungent and cheesy Malaysian noodle dish featuring a mix of fruits and a quick-fix recipe, this ovo-vegetarian friendly meal is perfect for a snack or lunch, with a brine-dry flavor profile that is sure to tantalize your taste buds.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the grated Malaysian cheese and stir until it is well combined with the onion and garlic mixture.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir to combine with the cheese mixture.
Add the fruit mix, brine, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for a few minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
